name: Frontier Systems Ventures
thesis: Seed-stage infrastructure companies that reduce compute cost, improve developer velocity, or make AI systems production-safe.
relevance_notes: Good fit for technical infrastructure wedges with measurable developer or compute ROI.

name: Civic Stack Fund
thesis: Software that modernizes public-sector workflows while preserving accountability, privacy, and human review.
relevance_notes: Best for public-sector products with credible procurement and compliance discipline.

name: HealthOps Capital
thesis: Workflow software for healthcare administration, revenue cycle, compliance, and clinical operations.
relevance_notes: Prioritizes evidence of workflow depth, compliance readiness, and measurable operational ROI.

name: Legal Signal Partners
thesis: AI-assisted legal operations tools where domain expertise, workflow data, and trust controls matter.
relevance_notes: Good target when legal liability and attorney-in-the-loop workflows are handled seriously.

name: Gridline Climate Ventures
thesis: Software and data systems for grid modernization, energy finance, industrial decarbonization, and project bottlenecks.
relevance_notes: Strong fit for companies attacking grid interconnection, permitting, and energy-data workflows.

name: Robotic Foundry
thesis: Applied robotics companies with practical deployment models, strong unit economics, and industrial workflows.
relevance_notes: Prioritizes hardware reliability, service model, and operating proof over demos.

name: Payments Core Ventures
thesis: Financial infrastructure APIs that reduce back-office complexity for platforms, fintechs, and vertical SaaS companies.
relevance_notes: Good match for reconciliation, ledger, and compliance APIs with strong technical founders.

name: DevLoop Seed
thesis: Developer tools with bottom-up adoption, technical credibility, and clear team collaboration monetization.
relevance_notes: Best when there is evidence of active usage, community pull, and paid team workflows.

name: SecureAgent Capital
thesis: Security products for AI-native workflows, agentic systems, data boundaries, and enterprise trust.
relevance_notes: Strong fit for agent monitoring and policy-control products with enterprise security buyers.

name: Workflow Hill Ventures
thesis: B2B workflow software that converts messy operational processes into recurring systems of record.
relevance_notes: Useful target for implementation, field-service, finance-ops, and operational AI workflows.

name: Consumer Lab Angels
thesis: Early consumer AI products with retention evidence, privacy trust, and distinct distribution advantages.
relevance_notes: Only relevant when consumer retention and privacy posture are credible.

name: Ed Frontier Fund
thesis: Education technology that improves learning workflows while respecting institutional policy and student privacy.
relevance_notes: Strong fit for university workflow tools with academic-integrity safeguards.

name: Defense Catalyst
thesis: Dual-use and defense technology startups with operational relevance, procurement pathway, and mission credibility.
relevance_notes: Best for companies needing defense customer discovery and non-dilutive funding pathways.

name: University Venture Studio
thesis: Student and faculty-linked startups with disciplined market discovery, research depth, and public-interest relevance.
relevance_notes: Useful for spinouts, undergraduate research commercialization, and thesis-driven student founders.

name: Atlas Warehouse Strategic Ventures
thesis: Operational technology for warehouse safety, logistics automation, fulfillment visibility, and labor productivity.
relevance_notes: A strategic fit for warehouse robotics and field operations products with pilot-ready deployments.

name: Industrial AI Partners
thesis: AI systems that improve industrial uptime, quality, safety, and supply-chain resilience.
relevance_notes: Good fit for industrial operations software with a clear deployment path.

name: Policy AI Research Fund
thesis: AI governance, public-interest technology, and decision-support tools where accountability and evidence discipline are central.
relevance_notes: Relevant for products that separate facts, model inferences, unknowns, and human-review requirements.

name: Vertical Ops Angels
thesis: Founder-operator teams building vertical software for overlooked operational jobs.
relevance_notes: Useful for very early teams with credible operator insight and early usage evidence.

name: Open Source Seed Collective
thesis: Open-source infrastructure and developer tools with fast community pull and clear commercial layers.
relevance_notes: Good for repositories with visible usage, maintainer credibility, and managed-service potential.

name: Foundry Legal & Fintech
thesis: Trust-heavy software for regulated back offices, especially legal, fintech, and compliance workflows.
relevance_notes: Best for products where compliance, auditability, and regulated workflow depth are assets.

name: AI Workbench Ventures
thesis: AI-native workbench products that become the operating layer for specialized teams.
relevance_notes: Good fit for controlled workflow agents with auditability and repeated usage.

name: Main Street AI Fund
thesis: AI software for SMB operations where the buyer pain is immediate and distribution can be verticalized.
relevance_notes: Relevant for field-service, clinics, and small operating businesses with clear ROI.

name: Climate Adaptation Angels
thesis: Early software companies helping institutions adapt to climate, energy, infrastructure, and resilience constraints.
relevance_notes: Good target for energy, public infrastructure, and resilience products with credible domain data.

name: Enterprise Trust Capital
thesis: Enterprise software where trust, security, auditability, and operational data create adoption advantage.
relevance_notes: Strong fit for companies with compliance-heavy workflows and enterprise security expectations.

name: Student Founder Network
thesis: Student-led startups with disciplined research, early customer discovery, and realistic MVP execution.
relevance_notes: Useful for university-linked teams and student venture research introductions.

name: Strategic Health Network Ventures
thesis: Healthcare operations technology that improves administrative throughput, compliance, and patient financial experience.
relevance_notes: Strategic fit for healthcare operations tools that can prove compliance and measurable workflow savings.
